_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Operational management involves ensuring the operational processes of a product or service are effective and robust.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, maintaining service quality as data volume, consumer count, and pipeline complexity increase.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.515), OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.515).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.516). Shared vocabulary: [operational, processes, service]. DDaT-only terms [effective, ensuring, involves, management, product, robust] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.887, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DDaT element's 16 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Operational management involves ensuring the operational processes of a product" and "Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, m" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.583 > STS 0.516 (gap +0.066). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [operational, processes, service] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [operational, processes, service]. DDaT-only: [effective, ensuring, involves, management, product, robust]. WIDAI-only: [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, design].

signals.detail: STS 0.516 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
